added: Lucide Bug icon for notification badge - perfect branding for pest control notifications
fixed: Push notifications on Android now display client name correctly (was showing 'undefined')
Push notifications now use proper monochrome badge for Android status bar (fixes white square issue)

changelog.notes: Critical bug fixes for push notifications on Android devices - proper status bar icon implementation

fixed: Offline sync now retries indefinitely until successful (never deletes unsynced reports)
Duplicate report detection now handles HTTP 409 responses correctly
Added 30-second timeout to API calls to prevent infinite loading states
Network connectivity verification before sync attempts

changelog.notes: Enhanced offline reliability and data safety - reports are never deleted if unsynced

fixed: Version control infinite loop issue - update modal now properly refreshes to new version
removed: Automatic report data prefill from previous report (will be re-enabled via settings panel in future update)

fixed: Bait stations now display in correct numeric order (1, 2, 3... 20, 21) instead of alphabetical order (1, 11, 12... 2, 20, 21) on reports

changelog.notes: Bug fix release - Corrected bait station sorting in PDF reports and report displays

added: Complete admin portal with client, user, and assignment management
PCO mobile-friendly portal with offline sync capabilities
Automated report generation with PDF export functionality
Email notification system for report delivery and status updates
Push notifications for real-time assignment updates
Bait station and equipment tracking system
Chemical inventory management with L-number tracking
Batch number management for fumigation reports
Draft reports feature for incomplete inspections
Client self-assignment portal for direct booking
Comprehensive audit trails for all system activities
security: JWT-based authentication with secure token management
SQL injection prevention with parameterized queries

changelog.notes: Initial production release - Full system deployment with all core features
